steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Given $y = 2$ cubic feet, substitute into $32x + 81y = 290$: $32x + 81(2) = 290$, so $32x + 162 = 290$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $4$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $4$ is the value to enter.
